feat: specialty audit/fix section in db_audit.html (#134)

* fix: split multi-number phone fields into individual tap-to-call entries

locPhones() splits phone/fax fields on '/' or ',' and renders each
number as its own row with its own tel: link — one tap per number.
Applies to both phone and fax fields in location detail views.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* fix: split multi-number phone fields + db_audit phone cleanup tool

- locPhones() in nav.js: any phone/fax field with / or , separators
  renders each number as its own tap-to-call row (display fix, live now)
- db_audit.html: new section finds all multi-number phone/fax entries,
  Fix All button splits first number → phone, second → fax (or notes
  if fax already occupied)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* fix: upcoming tasks use gray bar in Tasks view to match History view

Tasks tab was showing yellow (#f59e0b) left bar for upcoming reminders
while History tab showed gray (#6b7280) for the same items. Both now
consistently use gray for upcoming, red for overdue, green for completed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* feat: dedicated activity search by name, practice, city, notes

Adds a search bar directly in the History/Activity/Tasks view that
searches ONLY contact_logs — completely independent of the global
sidebar search. Covers: provider name, practice name, location city,
address, label, note text, author, date.

- _activitySearchTerm state variable persists across tab switches
- activitySearch() re-renders whichever activity sub-tab is active
- Clears automatically when navigating away from activity section
- × button to clear search inline

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* fix: clear CSV paste textarea immediately after import starts

Prevents stale CSV text from being accidentally re-imported or
corrupting a subsequent paste.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* feat: add specialty audit/fix section to db_audit.html

New section shows every provider with a specialty value outside the 5
valid options (Podiatry, Wound Care, Dermatology, Other, Administrative
Staff). Groups providers by bad value with count + examples, per-group
remap dropdown, individual Fix button, and Fix All Mapped batch action.

Handles NULL/blank specialty (remaps both null and empty string).
Bad specialty count added to stats grid and total issues tally.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

commit.message:
ATTAINS cold-start optimization: per-state blob persistence and lazy loading

Split monolithic ATTAINS blob (2-3MB) into per-state files (~40-100KB each) with
a lightweight meta blob (~200 bytes). Components that only need one state now
download ~97% less data on cold Vercel instances.

- Add per-state blob save/load (cache/attains/{STATE}.json + _meta.json)
- Add ensureMetaWarmed(), ensureStateLoaded(), getAttainsStateData() for lazy per-state loading
- New attains-state-data API action: ?action=attains-state-data&state=MD
- Switch K12/MS4/NGO/State/University components to per-state endpoint
- Switch StateReportCard to attains-national-summary (counts only, ~5KB)
- Make buildStateAssessmentData async with per-state loading
- Keep monolithic blob + ensureWarmed() for backward compat with national endpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update ROADMAP and specs to reflect v0.2.1 runtime extraction

commit.message:
fix(schedule): handle MedSoft 'Z' UTC suffix in timezone normalization

MedSoft returns local Romanian times with a 'Z' suffix (e.g. "08:00:00Z").
The old normalization skipped any string containing 'Z' or '+', so the env var
MEDSOFT_TZ_OFFSET had zero effect — browsers received "08:00Z" and interpreted
it as UTC, adding 2h and showing 10:00 instead of 08:00.

New normalizeDateTime():
- Strips 'Z' and '+00:00' suffixes before appending the configured offset
- Leaves strings that already have a non-UTC offset (e.g. "+02:00") unchanged
- Handles all three MedSoft response formats: bare, Z-terminated, or +HH:MM

MEDSOFT_TZ_OFFSET=+02:00 must be re-added in Vercel env vars.
Adjust to +03:00 during EEST (April–October) if needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: login form broken due to async function in onsubmit handler

The decrypt() and check() functions are async, but the form used
onsubmit="return fn()" which receives a Promise (truthy) instead
of false, causing the form to submit as GET and reload the page.

Fixed by using event.preventDefault() before calling the async function.
Regenerated encrypted report with working login.

commit.message:
Fix PWA session persistence: re-set cookies on every request + extend DB sessions

Root cause: Neon Auth sets session cookies without Max-Age/Expires (session
cookies). iOS WebKit kills these when the PWA process terminates. Our previous
fix only modified Set-Cookie headers during sign-in, but the middleware doesn't
re-set cookies on normal navigation.

Fixes:
- proxy.ts: Re-set session_token and session_data cookies with 30-day Max-Age
  on every authenticated /dashboard request using NextResponse.cookies.set()
- dashboard/layout.tsx: Extend neon_auth.session expiresAt from 7→30 days
  (non-blocking fire-and-forget DB call on each render)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(api): cancel agent graph on WebSocket disconnect

Race the agent task against a disconnect sentinel using
asyncio.wait(FIRST_COMPLETED). When the client disconnects mid-stream,
the agent task is cancelled immediately -- freeing the LLM slot and
preventing orphaned requests from blocking concurrent connections.

Also fixes remaining e2e test flakiness: datetime import bug in seed
fixtures, stepper/loan-amount strict mode violations, chat panel
waitFor timing, and underwriter detail navigation timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(api): update seed idempotency test to use real config hash

The test used a hardcoded hash that no longer matches after
compute_config_hash was changed to hash full fixture content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace commit-and-push with ship skill, bump to 1.5.0

The new ship skill lets users pick any combination of release actions
(version, docs, commit, tag, push) instead of the rigid docs+commit+push
sequence. Actions are always executed in canonical order regardless of
argument order.

commit.message:
ログイン待機の点滅バグを根本修正 + 残留プロセス対策

【点滅の原因】
ログインページURL (access.line.me/...?redirect_uri=...creator.line.me...)
のクエリパラメータにcreator.line.meが含まれるため、
「creator.line.meにいる」と誤判定してpage.goto()を毎回実行していた。

【修正内容】
- ポーリングループからpage.goto()を完全に排除
- URLの変化だけを監視するシンプルな方式に変更
- ブラウザ起動前に残留Chromiumプロセスを強制終了

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Split flappy-unicorn into focused JS modules

Extracted 730 lines of inline JS from index.html into 6 small files:
- constants.js  (~20 lines) — canvas, physics constants, color palettes
- audio.js      (~55 lines) — Web Audio API sound effects
- state.js      (~25 lines) — mutable game state variables
- game.js       (~110 lines) — init, input, spawning, collision
- draw.js       (~260 lines) — all canvas draw functions
- loop.js       (~80 lines) — update logic and main game loop

index.html is now an 89-line HTML/CSS shell.
Each file can now be edited independently without token issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove wsl2-fix-path.md — fix is committed and no longer needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement @extern FFI and extract all stdlib to runtime functions

- Add @extern(rs/ts, "module", "function") syntax for FFI declarations
- Support body-optional functions with completeness checking
- Extract platform modules (fs, env, process, io, random) to platform_runtime.txt
- Extract core modules (string, int, float, math) to core_runtime.txt
- Extract collection modules (list, map) including lambda-based functions to collection_runtime.txt
- Rename TS runtime module prefix from __ to __almd_ for proper namespacing
- All stdlib codegen now delegates to almide_rt_* runtime functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add 6 database indexes on Relationship, ConnectorDepartmentBinding, InternalDocument, PropertyValue
- Add Zod validation to 15 API endpoints (9 mutations, 6 query params) via central api-validation.ts
- Harden document upload: 10MB file size limit (413), MIME allowlist, rate limiting (10/5min upload, 5/5min reprocess)
- Add global-error.tsx, not-found.tsx, and 9 per-route error.tsx boundaries
- Add cursor-based pagination to copilot messages, connected entities, external links, situations
- Add LRU chunk cache (5min TTL, 1K max chunks) and batch embedding queue for RAG pipeline
- Rewrite retriever with per-department caching and empty-department skip optimization
- Add stress-seed.ts: idempotent script creating 10 depts, 50 members, 30 docs/300 chunks, 5K digital entities, 500 external entities, 20 situation types, 100 situations
- All performance targets met: map <52ms, dept detail <330ms, situations <24ms, learning <68ms, DB 8MB

commit.message:
Fix photo picker — switch from PHAsset to local file storage

PhotosPicker's itemIdentifier isn't a PHAsset localIdentifier,
so PHAsset.fetchAssets found nothing and images never loaded.

Now uses loadTransferable to get raw image data, saves as JPEG
to Documents/photos/, and references by filename. Removes Photos
framework dependency entirely — the privacy-preserving picker
handles access itself. No NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription needed.

commit.message:
Fix recovery path: don't short-circuit when metadata is missing

When power dies between finalize_output and save_metadata, the old
recovery path cleaned up the checkpoint and returned True (skip).
But the dispatcher requires BOTH CSV + metadata to exist. Result:
dispatcher re-queued → next run archived the good CSV → full re-run.

Fix: return False (proceed) without cleaning up intermediates.
The normal flow resumes with all draws already in checkpoint,
for-loop skips everything, finalize harmlessly re-writes CSV,
and save_metadata finally writes the missing sidecar.

commit.message:
Fix Drizzle array parameter passing — replace ANY(::text[]) with IN + sqlInList

Drizzle's sql template passes JS arrays as single string params, not
Postgres array literals. Replaced all ANY(${arr}::text[]) and ::int[]
patterns with either inArray() for Drizzle model queries or
IN (${sqlInList(arr)}) for raw neon_auth SQL queries.

Added sqlInList() helper to lib/db.ts that creates properly parameterized
IN ($1, $2, ...) lists via sql.join().

fix: restore hard-coded thread pool size limit of 16 (#48128)

## Summary
- Restore the hard-coded maximum of 16 threads for the C++ IO thread
pool
- In large file scenarios, CGo threads can consume all available thread
resources, starving Go goroutines
- This reverts commit ffd3435c4f and the related test changes from
a41d170c14

issue: https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/issues/48060

## Test plan

(`ThreadPoolTest.ResizeAboveMaximum`)
- [ ] Test large file load scenarios to confirm Go goroutines are no
longer starved

repository.name: milvus
repository.description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search

commit.message:
fix: monitorar-ads com breakdown diário e alerta de campanha parada

- buscarInsights agora retorna diasData (diário) + totalData (agregado)
- analisar() usa dias ativos para média real (ignora dias zerados)
- alerta de gasto: detecta campanha parada por data, não compara total vs esperado
- formatarComentario: inclui breakdown dia a dia no comentário ClickUp
- log console mostra dia a dia com veiculação e leads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Whisper 인게임 대사 필터 + auto_scaler ADMIN_API_KEY 주입

- transcriber.py: no_speech_prob(>0.6) + avg_logprob(<-1.0) 세그먼트 필터
  → 게임 BGM/효과음/NPC 대사 자동 제거
- auto_scaler.py: ADMIN_API_KEY를 pod 환경변수에 추가
  → Worker→Control 에러 보고 + 쿠키 다운로드 정상화

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

revert: remove regime switching, restore v4 time-weighted training

10y walk-forward 驗證（508 再平衡期）顯示 regime switching 長期有害：
- sideways (35%) topN×75% 縮減造成超額 -0.21%/期持續損耗
- bear heuristic 評分 10y 整體表現劣於模型（超額 -0.76%/期）
- 10y with regime switching: 超額 +3.18%，MDD -93.53%，Sharpe -0.33

移除 regime switching 後 10y 結果：
- 累積 -84.96%，大盤 -85.35%，超額 +0.38%
- MDD -87.74%，Sharpe -0.36，勝率 39.56%，停損 1082 次

Changes:
- skills/backtest.py: 移除 regime_switching 參數及相關邏輯，還原原始 market filter
- skills/daily_pick.py: 移除 regime 切換與 bear heuristic 評分區塊
- skills/market_regime.py: 加 # NOT IN USE 頭三行（保留供未來研究）
- scripts/run_backtest.py: 移除 --regime-switching CLI 參數
- CLAUDE.md: 更新 v7 現行架構、10y 回測數字、Regime Switching 移除原因

chore: initial commit -- scaffold, CLAUDE.md, docs, git hygiene

- Full 15-crate Rust monorepo (identity, marketplace, payout, deployment,
  license, checklist, matching, compliance, telemetry, analytics,
  reputation, notification, environment orchestrator, MCP server, common)
- Next.js 15 frontend (dashboard, marketplace, leaderboard, quality-gate,
  proof-of-human, proposal UI, 11 components, lib/api.ts)
- 13 SQLx migrations (unified_profiles to reputation_vcs)
- CLAUDE.md: five-role guide (Architect, Developer, Security, UI/UX, Auditor)
- .gitattributes: LF enforcement for all text files (CRLF risk eliminated)
- .gitignore: excludes node_modules, .next, target, .env, *.wasm, *.log
- .cargo/config.toml: SQLX_OFFLINE=true default, incremental builds
- Dockerfile: rust:1.84 -> rust:1.94 (matches dev toolchain, closes gap)
- Cargo.toml: uuid features += v7; profile.release lto+strip+opt-level=z
- docs/: architecture, security-audit, api-spec, 4 ADRs, 2 runbooks,
         incident-response, GDPR Article 30 register, secret registry
